disambiguated.context: Both a physician and a taxi driver had their bags searched at the airport. A drug-sniffing dog had signalled that officers should look into the bag of the physician and, sure enough, they found quite a bit of heroine. After the taxi driver's bag was flagged and searched, though, they were let go as it was apparently just a false alarm.
disambiguated.question: Who had drugs on them?
